title: PokeCoin
description: Add the PokeCoin item to your game !
body:
Nothing more than just **PokeCoins** ! Created to use them as a **currency** on your cobblemon server !


![In-game PokeCoin](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7b24eaf7debb2d8422b5c7542a6735d5dabd8e98_0.webp)

**Not craftable and only obtainable in creative.**



Take a look at my ressourcespack [Cobblehats](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cobblehats), adding various Pokemon themed hats to your game !
